subcodes.first_line: He Who transformeth all things hath verily appeared, and from the horizon of the Prison of 'Akká hath been raised the call: "O son of Khalíl!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی من تبدل به الاشیاء و ارتفع الندآء من افق سجن عکاء یا بن خلیل یا
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to Jews, @power of the Manifestation of God, @call to action, @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael, @Moses
